series_metadata.series_description: Vehicle Records – Monthly Reports lists the cars owned by BWC. The information tracked in the reports are gas purchases, miles drive and related purchases.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The electronic files are uploaded to the Fleet Sharepoint site and also updated to the DAS Fleet Ohio system. Retain electronic records for one full fiscal year (FY). Once the annual DAS Fleet Plan is created and approved for the prior FY – delete the records., Electronic: Delete
